data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic hold expiry and seat release.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for automatic hold expiry and seat release, as outlined in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence related to the automatic release of seats or the expiry of holds, which is critical to confirming this requirement. The evidence only confirms that bookings were made, but does not address the specific functionality of hold expiry and seat release, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of automatic hold expiry or seat release functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the automatic hold expiry and seat release requirement.
